name: Valve Open
description: Industrial valve turning to release position

prompts.label: industrial valve handle turning to open release position
prompts.text: industrial valve handle turning to open release position, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, with natural decay

prompts.text: gate valve wheel rotating with metallic threading, Victorian clocktower, ratchet wrench click, oiled-machine rhythm, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, impactful, smooth fade out
